CustomField.description: Effective FRA deadline after adding clock suspension days. Formula: nepa_fra_statutory_deadline__c + nepa_clock_pause_days__c. This is the date used for overdue determination in NEPA_SLA_Escalation_Monitor when the clock has been paused. Equals nepa_fra_statutory_deadline__c when no pause has occurred.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Statutory deadline + suspended days. This is the operative compliance deadline when a pause has occurred.
CustomField.label: FRA Adjusted Deadline
